title: Reporting on Subitems
excerpt: I would like a view and/or report for all subitems in a board matching a given set of conditions. Parent information would be fine but I can do without it for my purposes. Ideally, would like this to be emailed on a sche…

posts.author: mcallarse (Baika Brown)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like a view and/or report for all subitems in a board matching a given set of conditions. Parent information would be fine but I can do without it for my purposes. Ideally, would like this to be emailed on a schedule if there are items matching the condition(s). Can any of this be done natively in Monday? If not, any user-friendly tools would the community recommend for this?

(I can do this with the API, but am looking for a solution that does not require scripting/coding.)

Thanks.

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mcallarse!

I would recommend waiting until advanced filter support for subitems comes out (probably around Q2): Subitems Product Plan.

Then you could filter the subitems, save that as a board view, and create a link to that board view to go out in an email:

  • How to share a board view publicly?

  • Gmail Integration

  • Outlook Integration
